page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: The speaq package is meant to make Nuclear Magnetic Resonance spectroscopy (NMR spectroscopy) data analysis as easy as possible by only requiring a small set of functions to perform an entire analysis
page_metadata.biotools__summary: A framework for analyzing automatically raw 1D NMR spectra data. It is also compatible with other NMR frameworks or complementary LC-MS workflows.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A framework for analyzing automatically raw 1D NMR spectra data. It is also compatible with other NMR frameworks or complementary LC-MS workflows.
